name: AWS-Dev (Amazon_RME_BridgeOps)
postCreateCommand: bash -lc "if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt || true; fi; make setup; echo 'Tool versions:'; aws --version || true; amazonq --version || true; terraform -version || true; cdk --version || true; echo 'APM Assistant ready - run: make demo'"
